name: caydeesoft-payments
title: Caydeesoft Laravel Mobile Money Payments
description: MCP-style catalog for a Laravel mobile money package supporting M-Pesa, Airtel Money, T-Kash, EazzyPay, MTN and Tigo.

resources.name: Composer package metadata
resources.description: Laravel package metadata, keywords, support links and auto-discovery configuration.

resources.name: Payments configuration
resources.description: Default channel, environment, callback route and provider base URL configuration.

resources.name: Callback routes
resources.description: Laravel routes for generic provider callbacks and legacy M-Pesa callback endpoints.

resources.name: Developer README
resources.description: Installation, usage, callback routes and endpoint override examples.

tools.name: payments_channel_operation
tools.description: Describe or invoke a payment operation through the Laravel Payments facade. Live invocation should require explicit user approval and valid provider credentials.

payload.description: Provider request data. May include endpoint override for Airtel Money, T-Kash and EazzyPay partner-specific APIs.

tools.name: payments_callback_parser
tools.description: Normalize incoming callback payloads for supported providers and events without assuming undocumented provider schemas.

security.notes: Never expose provider credentials in MCP resources, README examples, logs or callback responses. Require explicit approval before live payment API calls.
